activate().details: Self-activation function for validators, gaining `PendingActivation` status and setting next epoch as activation epoch to ensure rewards eligibility only after completing a full epoch

applyIncentives((address,uint256)[]).details: Records block production performance weights for the current epoch

applySlashes((address,uint256)[]).details: The network's slashing mechanism, which penalizes validators for misbehaving

beginExit().details: Issues an exit request for a validator to be retired from the `Active` validator set

claimStakeRewards(address).details: Used by rewardees to claim staking rewards

concludeEpoch(address[]).details: Accepts the committee of voting validators for 2 epochs in the future

constructor.details: Stake for `initialValidators_` is allocated as ERC-20 RLS balance entries; the corresponding RLS tokens must be transferred to this contract at genesisOnly governance delegation is enabled at genesis

params.initialValidators_: The initial validator set running Rayls Network; these validators will comprise the voter committee for the first three epochs, ie `epochInfo[0:2]`

delegateStake(bytes,(bytes,bytes),addres.details: Accepts delegated stake from a non-validator caller authorized by a validator's EIP712 signature

returns._0: _ EIP-712 typed struct hash used to enable delegated proof of stake

getBalanceBreakdown(address).details: Returns staking information for the given address

getCommitteeValidators(uint32).details: Fetches the committee for a given epoch

getCurrentEpochInfo().details: Returns the current epoch's committee and block height

getEpochInfo(uint32).details: Returns information about the provided epoch. Only four latest & two future epochs are stored

getEpochPerformanceWeights().details: Returns the performance weights recorded by the most recent applyIncentives call

getRewards(address).details: Fetches the claimable rewards accrued for a given validator address

returns._0: _ The validator's claimable rewards, not including the validator's stake

getValidators(uint8).details: Returns an array of unretired validators matching the provided status

params: `Active` queries also include validators pending activation or exit since all three remain eligible for committee service in the next epoch

isRetired(address).details: Returns whether a validator is exited && unstaked, ie "retired"

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pause().details: Emergency function to pause validator and stake management

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

proofOfPossessionMessage(bytes,address).details: Returns the BLS12-381 proof of possession message for given params

params.blsPubkeyUncompressed: Must provide the 192-byte uncompressed bls pubkey

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

rlsToken().details: Returns the ERC-20 RLS token address used for staking

stake(bytes,(bytes,bytes)).details: Accepts the ERC-20 RLS stake amount from the calling validator, enabling later self-activation

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

unpause().details: Emergency function to unpause validator and stake management

unstake(address).details: Returns previously staked funds in addition to accrued rewards, if any, to the staker

upgradeStakeVersion((uint256,uint256,uin.details: Permissioned function to upgrade stake, withdrawal, and consensus block reward configurations

params.amount: The amount of slashed funds to withdraw
params.to: The address to send the slashed funds to

activate().notice: Caller must be `Staked` status, ie staked or delegated

allowlistValidator(address).notice: Governance function to allowlist a validator address

applyIncentives((address,uint256)[]).notice: Weights are computed as stake × consensusHeaderCount per validatorCalled just before concludeEpoch; weights are consumed by RewardDistributor

applySlashes((address,uint256)[]).notice: Called just before concluding the current epochNot yet enabled during pilot, but scaffolding is included here. For the time being, system calls to this fn can provide empty calldata arrays

beginExit().notice: Reverts if the exit queue is full, ie if active validator count would drop too low

concludeEpoch(address[]).notice: Voting Validator Committee changes at the end every epoch via syscall

delegateStake(bytes,(bytes,bytes),addres.notice: `validatorAddress` must be a validator already`Ensuring `uncompressedPubkey` corresponds to `ValidatorInfo::blsPubkey` is better performed externally in Rust by the protocol due to EIP2537 precompile & EVM limitations so this contract does not perform any (un)compression checks

delegationDigest(bytes,address,address).notice: Returns the delegation digest that a validator should sign to accept a delegation

delistValidator(address).notice: Governance function to delist a validator address

getEpochInfo(uint32).notice: When querying for future epochs, `blockHeight` will be 0 as they are not yet known

getEpochPerformanceWeights().notice: Used by RewardDistributor to distribute fee-based rewards proportionally

isAllowlisted(address).notice: Check if an address is allowlisted to become a validator

isRetired(address).notice: After retiring, a validator's `tokenId == validatorAddress` cannot be reused

pause().notice: Does not pause system callable fns. Only accessible by `owner`

setDelegationPool(address).notice: Governance sets the DelegationPool contract address

slashedFunds().notice: Accumulated slashed funds received from DelegationPool, withdrawable by governance

stake(bytes,(bytes,bytes)).notice: Ensuring `uncompressedPubkey` corresponds to `ValidatorInfo::blsPubkey` is better performed externally in Rust by the protocol due to EIP2537 precompile & EVM limitations so this contract does not perform any (un)compression checks

unpause().notice: Does not affect system callable fns. Only accessible by `owner`

unstake(address).notice: May be used to reverse validator onboarding pre-activation or permanently retire after full exitOnce unstaked and retired, validator addresses cannot be reused

updateAllowlistBatch(address[],bool[]).notice: Governance function to batch update the validator allowlist

upgradeStakeVersion((uint256,uint256,uin.notice: The new version takes effect in the next epoch

validatorAllowlist(address).notice: Mapping of addresses allowed to become validators

withdrawSlashedFunds(address,uint256).notice: Governance function to withdraw accumulated slashed funds (ERC-20 RLS)
